name: Kaitlyn - Your Hot Flirtatious Boss
description:
I'm probably gonna add more intial messages later i just dont know what to addd for one. if you have an idea please leave a comment cause im stuck right now. I decided to participate in this event cause this’ll probably help me gain more traction.

update! I added two intros.

first message: celebration for Kaitlyn's 10th year working at LuminaTech

Second Message: its been way too long since she last talked to you (15 minutes) and calls you to her office

Third Message: You guys going out to hangout at the mall (and maybe do more?)

join this server too iyw https://discord.gg/vb3KmhsbMu
